Title: Database Schema & Migrations
Description: Create and apply all database migrations. Tables: R2PRequest, R2PStateTransition, R2PAcknowledgement, R2PResponse, R2PPayment, EventSubscription, AuditStore, OutboxEvent. R2PRequest.version column for optimistic locking. AuditStore is insert-only.
Acceptance Criteria: All 8 tables created with correct columns and constraints | Migrations are idempotent and reversible | R2PRequest.version supports optimistic locking | AuditStore enforces insert-only at DB level | Migrations run cleanly on a fresh database

Title: ISO 20022 Validator Middleware
Description: Stateless middleware validating inbound and outbound messages against ISO 20022 XSD schemas. Schemas: pain.013 (request initiation), pain.014 (response), camt.087 (modification). Returns { code: VALIDATION_ERROR, fields: [...] } on failure. Versioned independently of business logic.
Acceptance Criteria: Validates pain.013 / pain.014 / camt.087 schemas | Returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR with field-level detail | Valid messages pass through unchanged | Schema version is configurable without touching business logic | All unit tests pass

Title: Address Directory (POC Stub)
Description: In-memory static map resolving payer proxy (email / phone / alias) to participant endpoint and account reference. Seeded with 5 test participants. Output: { participantId, participantEndpoint, accountRef }.
Acceptance Criteria: Resolves email / phone / alias for all 5 seeded participants | Returns 404 for unknown proxy values | TTL field present on all resolved entries | All unit tests pass

Title: POST /r2p/requests — Create Request
Description: Core request creation. Validates via ISO 20022 Validator, resolves payer address, generates UUID v7 transaction ID, enforces idempotency via idempotencyKey, persists request, transitions status to created. Input: { payerId, payeeId, amount, currency, dueDate, expiryTimestamp, remittanceInfo, idempotencyKey }.
Acceptance Criteria: Returns r2pId (UUID v7) and status created on valid input | Duplicate idempotencyKey returns 409 DUPLICATE_REQUEST | Invalid input returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR with field detail | Request persisted to R2PRequest table | All unit tests pass

Title: PATCH /r2p/requests/{id} — Modify Request
Description: Modify permissible fields before payer accepts. State guard: only created or sent requests may be modified. Modifiable: amount / dueDate / expiryTimestamp / remittanceInfo.
Acceptance Criteria: Permissible fields updated for requests in created or sent state | delivered or later state returns 409 INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION | 404 returned for unknown r2pId | Modification recorded in R2PStateTransition and AuditStore | All unit tests pass

Title: DELETE /r2p/requests/{id} — Cancel Request
Description: Cancel an active request before acceptance. State guard: only created / sent / delivered states are cancellable. Triggers participant notification via Event Publisher.
Acceptance Criteria: Request transitions to cancelled from valid pre-acceptance states | Post-acceptance states return 409 INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION | Cancellation recorded in R2PStateTransition and AuditStore | Receiving participant notified | All unit tests pass

Title: Routing Engine — HTTPS Delivery
Description: Delivers R2P message to receiving participant via HTTPS POST. Transitions status from created to sent on dispatch. Records delivery state (pending / delivered / failed) in AuditStore. Internal trigger: called by R2P Request Service after creation.
Acceptance Criteria: Request delivered to receiving participant via HTTPS POST | Status transitions to sent immediately on dispatch | Delivery attempt recorded in AuditStore with timestamp | HTTP 2xx response marks delivery as delivered | All unit tests pass

Title: Routing Engine — Retry Logic & Failure State
Description: Exponential backoff retry on delivery failure. Up to 3 attempts / max 30s total. After retry exhaustion: status = failed; originating participant notified of rejection.
Acceptance Criteria: Retries up to 3 times with exponential backoff | Total retry window does not exceed 30 seconds | After 3 failures status transitions to failed | Originating participant notified of failed delivery | All unit tests pass

Title: POST /r2p/requests/{id}/acknowledge
Description: Receiving participant acknowledges delivery. Records timestamped ack, transitions state from sent to delivered, emits acknowledged event to Event Publisher. Input: { participantId, receivedAt }.
Acceptance Criteria: Status transitions to delivered on valid acknowledgement | Ack persisted to R2PAcknowledgement table with timestamp | 409 ALREADY_ACKNOWLEDGED on duplicate | acknowledged event emitted to Event Publisher | All unit tests pass

Title: POST /r2p/requests/{id}/respond
Description: Receives payer response: accept / decline / defer. Accept triggers Payment Execution Engine. Decline and defer transition state and notify originating participant. Input: { responseType, participantId, respondedAt }.
Acceptance Criteria: Accept triggers Payment Execution Engine | Decline / defer transitions state and notifies originating participant | Response persisted to R2PResponse table | Originating participant notified in real time via Event Publisher | All unit tests pass

Title: Response Validation
Description: Enforces preconditions before a response is accepted: request must be in delivered state / not expired / amount within constraints. Rejects invalid responses with structured error codes.
Acceptance Criteria: Responses to expired requests return 409 EXPIRED | Responses to non-delivered requests return 409 INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION | Amount out of range returns 400 VALIDATION_ERROR | All validation logic covered by unit tests | All unit tests pass

Title: Payment Execution Engine — Stubbed RTR Submission
Description: Triggered by accepted R2P response. Constructs real-time payment referencing R2P transaction ID. Submits to stubbed settlement rail (auto-returns success after 500ms). Transitions status to payment_processing. Input: { r2pId, paymentAmount, currency, payerId, payeeId }.
Acceptance Criteria: Payment message created with R2P transaction ID as linkage reference | Status transitions to payment_processing on submission | Stubbed settlement rail responds with success after 500ms | paymentId and r2pId persisted to R2PPayment table | All unit tests pass

Title: Settlement Confirmation Handling
Description: Handles settlement rail callback. Success → status = paid + emit paid event to both participants. Failure → status = payment_failed + notify both participants. All transitions recorded in R2PStateTransition and AuditStore.
Acceptance Criteria: Settlement success transitions status to paid | Settlement failure transitions status to payment_failed | Both participants notified via Event Publisher | All transitions recorded in R2PStateTransition and AuditStore | All unit tests pass

Title: GET /r2p/requests/{id} — Status Query
Description: Returns current status and full field set for a given R2P request. Available to both originating and receiving participants. Output: { r2pId, status, payerId, payeeId, amount, currency, dueDate, expiryTimestamp, createdAt, updatedAt }.
Acceptance Criteria: Returns correct current status and all fields for a known r2pId | Returns 404 for unknown r2pId | All unit tests pass

Title: GET /r2p/requests/{id}/history — State History
Description: Returns full ordered state transition history. Each entry includes fromState / toState / timestamp / actor. Output: { r2pId, transitions: [{ fromState, toState, timestamp, actor }] }.
Acceptance Criteria: Returns all state transitions in chronological order | Each entry includes fromState / toState / timestamp / actor | Returns 404 for unknown r2pId | All unit tests pass

Title: Expiry Scheduler
Description: In-process scheduled job (setInterval / 60s cadence). Queries non-terminal requests where expiryTimestamp < now. Transitions to expired and emits expiry events to both participants. Uses optimistic locking to avoid race conditions.
Acceptance Criteria: Scheduler runs every 60 seconds | All non-terminal expired requests transition to expired | Expiry events emitted to both participants via Event Publisher | Optimistic lock conflict returns 409 and scheduler retries | All unit tests pass

Title: POST /r2p/subscriptions — Event Subscription Management
Description: Participants register a webhook callback URL and event types to receive. Persists to EventSubscription table. Input: { participantId, callbackUrl, eventTypes: [delivered / responded / paid / expired / cancelled] }.
Acceptance Criteria: Valid subscription persisted with status active | callbackUrl validated as a well-formed HTTPS URL | eventTypes validated against allowed set | 400 returned for invalid input | All unit tests pass

Title: Event Publisher — Webhook Delivery
Description: Delivers state change events via HTTPS POST webhook. OutboxEvent pattern: every event persisted before delivery. Marked delivered on HTTP 2xx. Background sweeper retries undelivered events with exponential backoff up to 24 hours. Payload: ISO 20022-wrapped event envelope.
Acceptance Criteria: All events persisted to OutboxEvent table before delivery | HTTP 2xx marks event as delivered | Non-2xx triggers background sweeper retry with exponential backoff | Retry window covers up to 24 hours | All unit tests pass

Title: Audit Store Query API
Description: Read-only endpoint returning complete audit trail for a given R2P request — all state transitions / API calls / validation results / system events. Output: { r2pId, entries: [{ eventType, actor, timestamp, detail }] }.
Acceptance Criteria: Returns all audit entries in chronological order | Endpoint is strictly read-only (no mutations) | Returns 404 for unknown r2pId | All unit tests pass
